source: worldbuilding-lore.md — campaign-specific rules and MESA field equipment mechanics
note: Custom and house-rule moves for the PORTAL campaign. Stored separately from motw-basic-moves.json and motw-playbooks.json. The roll interface should merge these with the standard move lists at runtime.

custom_moves.name: Substance Theta — Active Dose
custom_moves.trigger: When you take an active dose of Substance Theta
custom_moves.description: A proprietary pharmacological compound developed by Meridian BioSciences. The active dose restructures the cognitive map, granting full liminal perception for 2-3 hours. Long-term use permanently degrades the cognitive map.

outcomes.10_plus: Full liminal perception for 2-3 hours — direct sight of entities, perception of BIM frequency effects before they manifest, navigation by liminal topology. No immediate side effects.
outcomes.7_9: Full liminal perception for 2-3 hours, but take 1-harm (weird). Withdrawal: 12-18 hours of unreliable normal perception afterwards.
outcomes.miss: Perceptual dissolution — you cannot distinguish physical from liminal for the rest of the session without help from another hunter or intervention.

custom_moves.availability: MESA operatives. Rook carries active doses at her discretion. Prophylactic doses are standard issue to MESA field grunts (no roll — grants resistance to displacement effects only).

keeper_notes.bim_connection: The active compound is structurally similar to BIM particulate. MESA built a perception drug from ash. Rex examining a sample recognises the BIM signature within minutes — direct Project Veil breadcrumb.
keeper_notes.long_term_damage: Rook has taken three active doses in two years. Cognitive map degradation is accumulating. She is aware of this.
keeper_notes.prophylactic_dose: No roll required. Grants resistance to displacement effects in distortion zones. Side effects near active BIM sources: peripheral visual artefacts, mild temporal dissociation. Duration 4-6 hours.

custom_moves.name: Anchor Spike — Discharge
custom_moves.trigger: When the Anchor Spike is used against a target
custom_moves.description: A matte black tactical device, 15cm, looks like a heavy pen. One button. One use per charge; recharging requires lab equipment. Rook carries two. Emits a focused electrostatic discharge tuned to BIM frequency.

outcomes.general: Effect varies by target. No roll required — Keeper determines whether it connects based on fictional positioning.

target_effects.effect: 3-harm. Forces contraction and retreat. Does not destroy — hurts, in whatever way something without a nervous system experiences hurt.
Breaks contact immediately. 1-harm (weird). Disadvantage on Weird moves for the rest of the session.
3-harm. Forced out of any supernatural state for the rest of the scene. Rook will then know what he is. He will know she knows.
target_effects.keeper_note: This is a significant revelation moment — use deliberately.

target_effects.effect: Forces contraction. Does not advance the doom clock, but buys approximately one hour of reduced effect in the district.

keeper_notes.bim_connection: Built using BIM particulate as tuning material. Rex examining one would recognise the theoretical framework and realise MESA is significantly ahead of PORTAL's research timeline. Direct Project Veil breadcrumb.
keeper_notes.rook_carries: Two units. Standard kit in active liminal zones.

custom_moves.name: BIM Collection Array — Recovered Sample
custom_moves.trigger: When a hunter recovers a BIM Collection Array from a MESA operative
custom_moves.description: Hardback-book-sized, matte grey, mesh face, sealed chamber. Looks like an air purifier. Grunts carry one each; told it is a contamination monitor. Vacuum-accumulates BIM-frequency particulate from active liminal zones.

outcomes.general: The device is recovered. Its contents are scientifically significant — BIM signature matches the S01 particulate from Eszter's case. Two cases, same material. Someone has been collecting this for years.

keeper_notes.significance: Most plot-significant retrievable object from a MESA encounter. The BIM signature match is Project Veil breadcrumb 2.
keeper_notes.grunts_believe: Grunts are told it is a contamination monitor. Most believe this.
keeper_notes.analysis: Rex identifying the contents connects S01 to S02 and MESA to Project Veil in a single move.

house_rules_note: Add campaign-specific rule modifications here. Format matches custom_moves entries. Examples: modified harm rules, custom clocks, PORTAL-specific investigation mechanics.
